title: Portuguese Paella with Flaxseed Crackers
description: A traditional Portuguese paella dish served with a side of crispy flaxseed crackers. This recipe is perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together ground flaxseed, salt, and water to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes and roll out to 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut into desired shapes and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy.
Heat oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add chicken broth, diced tomato, chopped artichoke, and paella rice.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Serve with crispy flaxseed crackers on the side.
